calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Spector appeared for the Petitioner. Marlene Getchell appeared for Nubia Castellon.

Mr. Spector informed the Court that there were no objections to the setllement and that the declaration and verifications were filed. After review of the said documents, the Court granted the petition and signed the order. The petition for instructions was taken off calendar.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Continued To Aug-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marlene Getchell appearing for trustee Nubia Castellon. Daniel Spector appearing by phone for petitioner. Discovery is pending. Mr. Spector requested to be refer to mediation. Ms. Getchell agreed to mediation. Court is referring this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 8/14. Matter is continued to 8/21 for status on mediation. If the matter is not settled, Court will set a hearing date.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1) For Instructions To Declare Donative Transfers To Care Custodian Void, 2) For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Temporary Successor Trustee; 3) For Removal Of Personal Representative And Appointment Of Special Administrator; 4) In The Alternative, To Set Aside Trust Agreement, Will And Joint Party Account On The Basis Of Undue Influence, Duress, Menace And Threat; 5) For An Order Restricting Receipt Of Certain Property And Service As Successor Trustee; 6) For Attorneys Fees An
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Continued To May-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Daniel Spector appearing for petitioners. Marlene Getchell appearing for respondent. Mr. Spector is starting discovery. He is requesting continuance of 120 days. Matter is continued to 5/22 for status. Mr. Spector is not seeking for removal today but he is requesting the Court to order a bond in the amount of $56,000.00 for the trustee. Ms. Getchell objected to a bond. She argued that the trustee may not qualify for a bond and Mr. Spector has filed a Lis Pendens on the real property. Court is ordering a bond in the amount of $56,000.00 for the trustee. Mr. Spector agreed to remove the Lis Pendens for the trustee to get a bond and he will put the Lis Pendens back after the transaction is completed. He will prepare the order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
